system.description:
In Athas, gods do not answer prayers. Instead of gods, clerics worship one of the four elemental planes: Earth, air, fire, or water. Clerics are free-willed priests tending the needs of the local people with their particular talents.

Holy Symbol: A cleric must carry a holy symbol

Spell Casting: Once a cleric has proven their faith (from 2nd level), the character may pray to receive spells from the sphere of the cosmos and one elemental sphere

Magic Item Creation: A cleric of any level may spend time and money on magical research. When a cleric reaches 9th level, they are able to create magic items

Turn Undead: Clerics can repel undead monsters and elementals. Turning succeeds if 2d6 roll is higher or equal to the HD threshold. Successful turning results in 2d6 HD of undead affected

Temple Establishment: A cleric may establish or build a temple, always outside big settlements, as elemental worship is forbidden by the sorcerer kings

class.weapons: All blunt weapons, plus additional weapons depending on chosen element (air: all missile weapons, earth: all stone weapons, fire: all obsidian weapons, water: all bone weapons)
